creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oleksandr Ignatyev from comment #7)
"Is any possibility to avoid 'make test' restriction?"
Yes, set the TESTING_UNSAFE variable as you did.

Would be nice "make test" be passed - thanks for PR on project page. Please follow it and if can use test please open a PR here. Thanks.

I commit current version.
